'''Ah Kwan''' was a stocky knife-wielding [[Human/Legends|Human]] thief with black hair and slanted eyes who was hiding out in [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] with his partner [[Quella]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].
